schemes.name: Credit Guarantee Trust for Micro & Small Enterprises
schemes.purpose: Collateral-free working capital / term loan up to ₹5 crore (modified scheme).
schemes.best_for: MSMEs needing credit without hard collateral

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana — Shishu
schemes.purpose: Loan up to ₹50,000 for micro ventures.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana — Kishore
schemes.purpose: Loan ₹50,001–₹5 lakh for small business expansion.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana — Tarun
schemes.purpose: Loan up to ₹10 lakh for established MSMEs.

schemes.name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
schemes.purpose: Collateral-free up to ₹3 lakh (tranche I ₹1L + II ₹2L) at 5% interest for artisans.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
schemes.purpose: Margin money subsidy (15-35%) on project cost up to ₹50 lakh (manufacturing).

schemes.name: Raising & Accelerating MSME Performance
schemes.purpose: World Bank-supported program for MSME capacity, tech upgradation & ZED certification.

schemes.name: IDBI Bank MSME Working Capital (OD/CC)
schemes.purpose: Overdraft / Cash Credit limit against drawing power for working-capital needs.
schemes.best_for: MSMEs with GST + banking transactions needing WC

schemes.name: IDBI Bill/Invoice Discounting
schemes.purpose: Discount GST invoices of blue-chip buyers to bridge receivables gap.
schemes.best_for: MSMEs with delayed receivables from rated buyers

schemes.name: IDBI MSME Smart Term Loan
schemes.purpose: Term loan for capex — plant, machinery, expansion.
